General.Name: Leeuwin Metals Ltd
General.Description: Leeuwin Metals Ltd engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Canada and Australia. The company explores for nickel and lithium deposits. Its flagship project is the Marda Gold Project located in Western Australia. The company was incorporated in 2021 and is based in Subiaco, Australia.

2.Name: Mr. Marcus Richard Alexander Harden B.Sc.
2.Title: Chief Geologist & Business Development
